# UC-14.10.15 · Aranet Seasonal Baseline Comparison for HVAC Efficiency

> **Criticality:** Low &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Analytics, Cost &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We compare indoor comfort across seasons to see if heating and cooling stay efficient.*

---

## Description

Comparing shoulder, summer, and winter indoor profiles shows drift in economizer or reheat strategy effectiveness.

## Value

Quantifies retrofit ROI and flags stuck dampers seasonally.

## Implementation

(1) Align UTC to building timezone. (2) Control for occupancy using CO2 gate. (3) Export to sustainability reporting.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-400d
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, ""))
| eval m=tonumber(strftime(_time, "%m"))
| eval season=case(m=1 OR m=2 OR m=12,"winter", m=6 OR m=7 OR m=8,"summer", 1=1,"shoulder")
| stats avg(temp) as avg_indoor by season location
```

## Visualization

Seasonal box plot; year-over-year line.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
